data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'Auto-sync when connection restored', but there is no evidence provided that confirms this functionality is implemented or functioning as required. The linked use case mentions this need, but lacks specific evidence demonstrating that the auto-sync feature is operational, indicating a clear gap in the requirement coverage. The absence of any concrete API reads or persisted state checks related to this functionality further supports the conclusion that the requirement is not satisfied.
gaps: No evidence of auto-sync functionality when connection is restored.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add evidence for auto-sync feature
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Verify that the system performs auto-sync when the connection is restored.
